meta.description: Tech Lead with 7+ years building full-stack solutions. Specialized in RAG, MCP and Spec-Driven Development.
hero.headline:
I build
agents that take
AI to real product.
hero.sub: 7+ years leading full-stack for government and private companies. Today I apply RAG, MCP and Spec-Driven Development to the development cycle — from architecture to commit.

about.title:
Tech Lead who codes,
architect who listens.
about.bio: I'm Diego Cabrera. I've built systems for Colombian government entities, city governments and private companies for the last 7 years. My day splits between architecture, hands-on code and leading teams that learn to work with AI agents.

that matters.

ask.title:
The idea I take to production,
right here.
ask.box.title: Ask me what I really do.
ask.box.lede: This box is a mini-RAG over my CV, projects and posts. It's the same idea I take to production for my clients.
ask.default.answer: Ask anything you want to know. Answers come from Diego's personal knowledge base (CV, projects, posts).
ask.preset.p1.a: Tech Lead with 7+ years building full-stack solutions for government and private sectors. Today I lead the AI strategy at SASOFTCO: RAG agents, Spec-Driven Development and MCP.
ask.preset.p2.a: Python · LangChain · Weaviate · MCP · Claude Code · Cursor. For the code that serves the agents: TypeScript, .NET Core and Java Spring Boot.
ask.preset.p3.a: Yes — available for collaborations on applied AI, scalable architectures or internal platforms.
ask.preset.p4.a: Conversational RAG agent on LangChain + Weaviate. In internal production, it reduced response time for technical queries by ~85% and every answer includes citations to the original source.
blog.title: Field notes on applied AI.
blog.lede: What I learn building agents, platforms and processes. No inflated theory — just what already worked (or failed).
